name: aether
description: AI-powered multi-modal knowledge engine for videos, PDFs, documents, and spreadsheets

scripts.start: concurrently -k "pnpm run start:api" "pnpm run start:web:only" "pnpm run start:ai" "pnpm run start:worker"
scripts.start:api: cd apps/api && PORT=3001 pnpm run dev
scripts.start:web:only: cd apps/web && PORT=3000 pnpm run dev
